title: Error
description:
An array containing one or more error objects identified during the request processing.
Each object provides detailed information about a specific type of error encountered.

type.description:
A URI identifying the specific type of error.  
This allows API consumers to programmatically recognize and handle the error appropriately.  

The URI follows the format: `errors:<domain>:<error_type>`  
Example values include:
- `errors:3dx:invalidRequest`
- `errors:3dx:authenticationGenericError`
- `errors:3dx:resourceNotFound`
- `errors:3dx:internalServerError`

title.description: A user-friendly error message, typically localized (NLS-supported), describing the general nature of the error.

errors.description:
A list of individual validation or processing errors related to the request.  
Useful when multiple issues are detected at once.

items.description: Details of a single error instance.

detail.description: A human-readable message offering guidance to resolve the specific error.

pointer.description: A [JSON Pointer](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6901) indicating the location of the field in the request payload where the error occurred.
